parameters.name: dateFrom
parameters.description: UTC date-time string indicating the start of the date range filter (max 90 days).

parameters.name: dateTo
parameters.description: UTC date-time string indicating the end of the date range filter (max 90 days).

parameters.name: nextToken
parameters.description: A token to specify where to start paginating. This is the NextToken from a previously truncated response. If not provided, pagination will start from the beginning.

anyOf.description: A token to specify where to start paginating. This is the NextToken from a previously truncated response. If not provided, pagination will start from the beginning.
